arts.ttl: Celtic in the hunt to sign Lille’s Mohamed Bayo
arts.sum: Mohamed Bayo (26) has hardly had a look-in at Lille OSC this season. Following the completion of his season-long loan at Le Havre AC, he returned to Lille in the…

arts.ttl: Lille’s stance holding back Napoli’s move for Edon Zhegrova
